SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.exceptions.ExitProgramException

Packages that use ExitProgramException
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.

    Method
    Description

    performs the specified section or paragraph

    ProceduralFlowManager.perform(String label, String thru)
    performs the specified section or paragraph until the other section indicated
    void
    ProceduralFlowManager.ProcessDelegate.run()
     
    void
    ProceduralFlowManager.run()
    Runs the flow previously defined
    void

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.atEnd(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the EOF condition has been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.invalidKey(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the invalid key condition has been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.notAtEnd(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the EOF condition has not been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.notInvalidKey(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the invalid key condition has not been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.onFailure(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if operation was not successfull
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.onSuccess(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if operation was successfull
    void
    FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate.run()

    Issues an ABEND command with the specified abend code.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressCommarea(AbstractNField ca, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the COMMAREA and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressTwa(AbstractNField twaField, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the TWA (Task Work Area) and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignFacility(AbstractNField sc, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the name of the facility that initated task to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.delayInterval(Interval timeInterval, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Pause execution for a specified time.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.documentCreate(AbstractDocumentCommand.InsertMode mode, String content, int length, String symbolList, Integer listLength, String delimiter, boolean unescaped, String hostcodepage, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Creates a document with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.documentDelete(String doctoken, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Deletes a document with the specified token.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.documentInsert(String doctoken, AbstractDocumentCommand.InsertMode mode, String content, int length, String at, String to, String hostcodepage, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Inserts content into a document with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.documentRetrieve(String doctoken, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int length, String characterset, boolean dataonly, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Retrieves a document with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.documentSet(String doctoken, boolean symbol, String p1, String p2, boolean unescaped, int listLength, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Sets symbols or symbol lists in a document with the specified parameters.
    protected CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, boolean handleAid, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2)
    Handles the end of CICS command execution by processing the command response, updating EIB fields, handling conditions and errors, and determining the appropriate action based on procedural logic or exception handling.
    protected CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2)
    Finalizes the execution of a command and returns the resulting response.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.handleAbend(String program, Integer labelId, boolean cancel)
    Handles an abend condition by specifying the program and label ID.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.link(String program, AbstractNField commarea, int length, String sysid, String transid, Channel channel, boolean synconreturn, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Invoke (LINK) a program with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.load(String program, NPointer set, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Loads a program and set its storage.
    void
    AbstractOnlineProgram.ISectionDelegate.perform()
     
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.receiveMap(String mapset, String map, ITerminalInputStream its, byte[] from, int fromOffset, int fromLength, byte[] into, int intoOffset, ReceiveCommandFlags flags, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Receives a map from the terminal into the specified byte array.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.release(String program, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Releases a previously loaded program from memory.
    void
    SupernautContext.returnToCaller()
    Returns control to the caller program.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.returnTransid(String transid, byte[] ca, int caOffset, int caLength, boolean immediate, Object payload, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Stops the task and schedules the specified transaction ID with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.signoff(boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Sign off from the system.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.signon(String userid, String password, String newpassword, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Sign on to the system with user ID and password.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.spoolClose(String token, SpoolDisposition disp, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Closes a spool.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.spoolOpenInput(String userid, String cls, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Open a spool for input.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.spoolOpenOutput(String userid, String node, String cls, String outdescr, SpoolCarriageReturn cr, boolean punch, int reclen, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Open a spool for output.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.spoolRead(String token, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int maxlength, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Reads data from a spool.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.spoolWrite(String token, byte[] from, int fromOffset, int length, SpoolWriteAction action, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Writes data to a spool.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.startTransid(String sysid, String transid, byte[] from, int fromOffset, int fromLen, String termid, Interval timeInterval, Channel channel, String queue, boolean protect, boolean nocheck, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Starts a task with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.xctl(String program, AbstractNField commarea, int length, Channel channel, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Transfer control (XCTL) to another program.
